name: The Last Immortal
overview: Yin, a hardworking Shuining Beast, and Gu Jin, the son of the true God whose magic has been sealed, meet by chance and embark on a quest to find Feng Yin's Immortal Essence. Alongside their companions, Hong Yi of the Fox Clan and Yan Shuang of the Eagle Clan, they face numerous challenges to collect the essence. Battling the villain Qing Lin and his followers, they overcome obstacles and, in the end, not only fulfill their mission to restore peace but also find love, friendship, and family.

trailers.title: 首发预告：赵露思王安宇缔结契约趣闯三界寻仙元【神隐 The Last Immortal】
